message:
test: add 24 tests for fs_bridge, backpressure, and kpi coverage gaps

- fs_bridge: 17 new tests covering batch conversion (from_fs_scored_results),
  map_fs_error all 5 arms, SyncEmbedderAdapter constructors/Debug/trait methods,
  doc ID boundary values (0, u64::MAX, negative, overflow), config precision loss
- backpressure: 4 new tests for compute_health_level_with_signals consistency,
  level_transitions readability, serde roundtrip all levels, from_u8 known values
- kpi: 3 new tests for quick_trend_report, empty forecast horizons, single horizon

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
